items.title: Exercising the team option for Micah Potter was an easy call for the Pacers — and mostly a formality.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Exercising the team option for Micah Potter was an easy call for the Pacers — and mostly a formality.

His contract is non-guaranteed, preserving flexibility. It doesn’t become guaranteed until Jan. 10, giving the FO time (and an option) to solidify its backup center plan.

items.title: June 29, 1995: MSG President Dave Checketts says the Knicks have filed tampering charges against the Miami Heat for interfering with New York's contractual relationship with Pat Riley, who resigned as head coach on June 15 with one year remaining on a 5-year contract.

items.body_excerpt:
June 29, 1995: MSG President Dave Checketts says the Knicks have filed tampering charges against the Miami Heat for interfering with New York's contractual relationship with Pat Riley, who resigned as head coach on June 15 with one year remaining on a 5-year contract.

items.title: JUST IN: Los Angeles Lakers guard Marcus Smart will decline his $5.39 million player option for the 2026-27 season and enter unrestricted free agency, league sources told HoopsHype. Smart started 54 of 62 games played last season for the Lakers. He’ll be coveted in free agency.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: JUST IN: Los Angeles Lakers guard Marcus Smart will decline his $5.39 million player option for the 2026-27 season and enter unrestricted free agency, league sources told HoopsHype. Smart started 54 of 62 games played last season for the Lakers. He’ll be coveted in free agency.
